about.title: Advanced Digital Engineering
about.subtitle: Web development, mobile apps, and cutting-edge technology consulting
about.description: We are a dynamic team dedicated to transforming ideas into high-impact digital products. We specialize in integrating Artificial Intelligence to empower businesses, focusing on building scalable, efficient, and user-centric solutions. Our agile approach ensures we use the latest tech stacks to give you a real competitive edge.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To empower businesses with cutting-edge technology, providing personalized dedication to every project we undertake.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To set new standards in digital quality, prioritizing clean code and exceptional user experiences over mass production.

values.title: Our Values
values.innovationDesc: We leverage the latest frameworks for speed and reliability
values.qualityDesc: We treat every line of code with obsessive attention to detail
values.collaborationDesc: We work side-by-side with you, without intermediaries
values.integrityDesc: Clear communication and honest timelines, always

terms.section1Content: The services provided under the name MIRALAB, as well as the content, visual design, source code, and logos present on miralab.ar, are the exclusive property of Octavio Patricio Frangipani.

Unauthorized use of this distinctive sign or reproduction of the contents of this site for commercial purposes by third parties is strictly prohibited.

matchpointPrivacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for the Matchpoint app.
matchpointPrivacy.title: Privacy Policy - Matchpoint
matchpointPrivacy.intro: Matchpoint ("the App") respects your privacy and processes personal data under principles of lawfulness, transparency, minimization, and security. This policy explains what data we collect, why we use it, how long we keep it, and which rights you can exercise.
matchpointPrivacy.controllerBody: Miralab is the data controller for personal data processed through Matchpoint. This policy applies to the mobile app, tournament features, and related services required for operation.
matchpointPrivacy.scopeBody: This policy applies to users who create accounts, sign in, create or manage tournaments, register teams, or interact with internal app features. It does not apply to third-party services outside Miralab control, even if linked from Matchpoint.
matchpointPrivacy.dataCollectedItem1: Account and identity data: email, first name, last name, and display name.
matchpointPrivacy.dataCollectedItem2: Profile data: gender (if provided), phone number (optional), and language preferences.
matchpointPrivacy.dataCollectedItem3: Usage data: tournaments, teams, registrations, invitations, and actions performed in the platform.
matchpointPrivacy.dataCollectedItem4: Technical and security data: session identifiers, basic device information, and operational logs for fraud prevention and service stability.
matchpointPrivacy.dataUseItem1: Create, authenticate, and manage your user account.
matchpointPrivacy.dataUseItem2: Enable sign-in through external providers (Google and Apple) and maintain secure sessions.
matchpointPrivacy.dataUseItem3: Operate core Matchpoint features: tournaments, teams, registrations, and invitations.
matchpointPrivacy.dataUseItem4: Improve performance, security, technical support, and overall service quality.
matchpointPrivacy.devicePermissionsBody: Matchpoint requests only permissions needed for app operation. If additional permissions are added in the future, their purpose will be clearly disclosed in-app and/or in this policy before use.
matchpointPrivacy.sharingBody: We do not sell personal data. We may share data with technology providers acting as processors (for example, authentication, infrastructure, hosting, and database services), strictly to provide the service and under confidentiality and security obligations.
matchpointPrivacy.transfersBody: Some providers may process data in jurisdictions different from your country. In such cases, we seek reasonable contractual and technical safeguards to maintain an adequate level of data protection.
matchpointPrivacy.retentionBody: We retain your data while your account is active or as needed to operate Matchpoint, resolve disputes, prevent abuse, and comply with legal or regulatory obligations. Data is deleted or anonymized when appropriate.
matchpointPrivacy.securityBody: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect data against unauthorized access, alteration, loss, or disclosure. No system is fully infallible, but we continuously review and improve controls.
matchpointPrivacy.childrenBody: Matchpoint is not directed to children under 13. If we detect child data without valid consent, we may restrict or remove the account and related data.
matchpointPrivacy.rightsBody: You may request access, rectification, update, or deletion of your data, and withdraw consent when applicable, by contacting: hola@miralab.ar.
matchpointPrivacy.accountDeletionBody: You may request deletion of your account and associated data through the contact channels below. Minimal operational evidence may be temporarily retained for legal or security reasons.
matchpointPrivacy.changesBody: We may update this policy to reflect legal, technical, or product changes. The current version will always be published at this URL:

matchpointDeleteAccount.metaDescription: Request account deletion and associated data removal for Matchpoint.
matchpointDeleteAccount.title: Account deletion - Matchpoint
matchpointDeleteAccount.intro: This page explains how to request deletion of your Matchpoint account and associated data.
matchpointDeleteAccount.howToStep3: Include the email address used to register in Matchpoint.
matchpointDeleteAccount.howToStep4: You will receive confirmation of receipt and request status.
matchpointDeleteAccount.quickActionText: To speed up the process, you can start the request directly by email:
matchpointDeleteAccount.deletedDataItem1: User account and associated profile (display name, preferences, and optional profile data).
matchpointDeleteAccount.deletedDataItem2: Participation links in tournaments and teams created by that account, when applicable.
matchpointDeleteAccount.deletedDataItem3: Session tokens and operational data associated with the account.
matchpointDeleteAccount.retainedDataTitle: 3. Data that may be temporarily retained
matchpointDeleteAccount.retainedDataItem1: Minimum technical logs for security and fraud prevention.
matchpointDeleteAccount.retainedDataItem2: Evidence required for legal compliance or dispute resolution.
matchpointDeleteAccount.retentionPeriod: Additional retention period: up to 90 days, unless a longer period is required by applicable law.
matchpointDeleteAccount.partialDeletionTitle: 4. Partial data deletion (without deleting the account)
matchpointDeleteAccount.partialDeletionBody: Yes, you may request partial deletion of specific data by emailing the same address and clearly indicating what information you want deleted or corrected.

matchpointLanding.metaDescription: Official Matchpoint landing page with product details and links to privacy policy and account deletion.
matchpointLanding.title: Matchpoint
matchpointLanding.subtitle: Beach volleyball tournaments app
matchpointLanding.description: Create tournaments, build teams, and manage registrations with a clear, fast, and modern mobile experience.
matchpointLanding.section1Body: Create staged tournaments, invite players, and manage the full competition flow in one place.
matchpointLanding.section2Body: Handle teams, slots, and registrations with simple flows for both organizers and players.
matchpointLanding.section3Body: Get direct access to the privacy policy and account/data deletion process.

rizePrivacy.metaDescription: Official privacy policy for Rize, the calisthenics training app developed by Miralab.
rizePrivacy.title: Privacy policy - Rize
rizePrivacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Rize, a calisthenics training app by Miralab, collects, uses, stores, and protects personal data.
rizePrivacy.controllerBody: Data controller: Miralab. Website: https://miralab.ar. Contact email: hola@miralab.ar.
rizePrivacy.scopeBody: This policy applies to the Rize mobile app, related web resources, and support channels.
rizePrivacy.dataCollectedItem1: Account and profile data (name, email, optional photo, basic preferences).
rizePrivacy.dataCollectedItem2: Training data (sessions, progress, goals, routines, workout logs).
rizePrivacy.dataCollectedItem3: Device and technical data (device model, app version, diagnostics, crash logs).
rizePrivacy.dataCollectedItem4: Support and communication data when users contact us by email.
rizePrivacy.dataUseIntro: We process data to operate and improve Rize, including:
rizePrivacy.dataUseItem2: Providing training tracking features and personalized progress views.
rizePrivacy.dataUseItem4: Responding to support requests and account-related actions.
rizePrivacy.devicePermissionsBody: Rize may request limited permissions (for example notifications) only when needed for app features. Permissions can be revoked in device settings.
rizePrivacy.sharingBody: We do not sell personal data. Data may be shared with service providers that support hosting, analytics, or communications under confidentiality obligations.
rizePrivacy.transfersBody: If data is processed outside the user's country, we apply reasonable safeguards and contractual protections.
rizePrivacy.retentionBody: Data is retained while the account is active and for limited additional periods when required for legal, security, or fraud-prevention purposes.
rizePrivacy.securityBody: We apply technical and organizational controls to protect data, including access restrictions and secure operational practices.
rizePrivacy.childrenBody: Rize is not intended for children under the minimum age required by applicable law without parental or guardian supervision.
rizePrivacy.rightsBody: Users may request access, correction, deletion, or restriction of processing by contacting hola@miralab.ar.
rizePrivacy.accountDeletionBody: Users can request deletion of their account and associated training data through the channels listed below.
rizePrivacy.changesBody: We may update this policy due to legal, technical, or product changes. The current version will always be available at:

rizeDeleteAccount.metaDescription: Request account deletion and associated data removal for Rize.
rizeDeleteAccount.title: Account deletion - Rize
rizeDeleteAccount.intro: This page explains how to request deletion of your Rize account and associated data.
rizeDeleteAccount.howToStep3: Include the email address used to register in Rize.
rizeDeleteAccount.howToStep4: You will receive confirmation of receipt and request status.
rizeDeleteAccount.quickActionText: To speed up the process, you can start the request directly by email:
rizeDeleteAccount.deletedDataItem1: User account and associated profile (display name, preferences, optional profile data).
rizeDeleteAccount.deletedDataItem2: Training records, goals, routines, and activity logs associated with the account.
rizeDeleteAccount.deletedDataItem3: Session tokens and operational account-related data.
rizeDeleteAccount.retainedDataTitle: 3. Data that may be temporarily retained
rizeDeleteAccount.retainedDataItem1: Minimum technical logs for security and fraud prevention.
rizeDeleteAccount.retainedDataItem2: Evidence required for legal compliance or dispute resolution.
rizeDeleteAccount.retentionPeriod: Additional retention period: up to 90 days, unless a longer period is required by applicable law.
rizeDeleteAccount.partialDeletionTitle: 4. Partial data deletion (without deleting the account)
rizeDeleteAccount.partialDeletionBody: Yes, users may request deletion or correction of specific data by contacting the same email and indicating what should be removed.

rizeLanding.metaDescription: Official Rize landing page with product details and links to privacy policy and account deletion.
rizeLanding.title: Rize
rizeLanding.subtitle: Calisthenics training app
rizeLanding.description: Plan workouts, track progress, and stay consistent with a clear, fast, and modern mobile training experience.
rizeLanding.section1Body: Build routines, organize training blocks, and structure your weekly sessions with simple flows.
rizeLanding.section2Body: Track your performance history, training consistency, and key movement progress in one place.
rizeLanding.section3Body: Get direct access to your privacy policy and account/data deletion process.

proshopPrivacy.metaDescription: Official privacy policy for Proshop, the ecommerce platform for technology products by Miralab.
proshopPrivacy.title: Privacy policy - Proshop
proshopPrivacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Proshop, an ecommerce platform for technology products by Miralab, collects, uses, stores, and protects personal data.
proshopPrivacy.controllerBody: Data controller: Miralab. Website: https://miralab.ar. Contact email: hola@miralab.ar.
proshopPrivacy.scopeBody: This policy applies to Proshop web and mobile experiences, checkout flows, and support channels.
proshopPrivacy.dataCollectedItem1: Account and profile data (name, email, phone, delivery preferences).
proshopPrivacy.dataCollectedItem2: Order and transaction data (cart activity, purchases, shipping details, payment references).
proshopPrivacy.dataCollectedItem3: Technical data (device/browser information, diagnostics, analytics events).
proshopPrivacy.dataCollectedItem4: Support and communication data when users contact customer support.
proshopPrivacy.dataUseIntro: We process data to operate and improve Proshop, including:
proshopPrivacy.dataUseItem2: Processing orders, deliveries, returns, and related communications.
proshopPrivacy.dataUseItem3: Improving reliability, performance, catalog relevance, and security.
proshopPrivacy.dataUseItem4: Providing support and complying with legal or fiscal obligations.
proshopPrivacy.devicePermissionsBody: Proshop may request limited permissions when required for account security or user experience features. Permissions can be revoked in device settings.
proshopPrivacy.sharingBody: We do not sell personal data. Data may be shared with logistics, payment, hosting, and analytics providers strictly to provide services under confidentiality obligations.
proshopPrivacy.transfersBody: If data is processed outside the user's country, we apply reasonable safeguards and contractual protections.
proshopPrivacy.retentionBody: Data is retained while the account is active and for additional periods required for legal, fiscal, fraud-prevention, or dispute-resolution purposes.
proshopPrivacy.securityBody: We apply technical and organizational controls to protect data, including role-based access and secure operational practices.
proshopPrivacy.childrenBody: Proshop is not intended for children under the minimum age required by applicable law without parental or guardian supervision.
proshopPrivacy.rightsBody: Users may request access, correction, deletion, or restriction of processing by contacting hola@miralab.ar.
proshopPrivacy.accountDeletionBody: Users can request deletion of their account and associated personal data through the channels listed below.
proshopPrivacy.changesBody: We may update this policy due to legal, technical, or product changes. The current version will always be available at:

proshopDeleteAccount.metaDescription: Request account deletion and associated data removal for Proshop.
proshopDeleteAccount.title: Account deletion - Proshop
proshopDeleteAccount.intro: This page explains how to request deletion of your Proshop account and associated data.
proshopDeleteAccount.howToStep3: Include the email address used to register in Proshop.
proshopDeleteAccount.howToStep4: You will receive confirmation of receipt and request status.
proshopDeleteAccount.quickActionText: To speed up the process, you can start the request directly by email:
proshopDeleteAccount.deletedDataItem1: User account and associated profile (contact and delivery preferences).
proshopDeleteAccount.deletedDataItem2: Saved cart and wishlist data linked to the account.
proshopDeleteAccount.deletedDataItem3: Session tokens and operational account-related data.
proshopDeleteAccount.retainedDataTitle: 3. Data that may be temporarily retained
proshopDeleteAccount.retainedDataItem1: Minimum technical logs for security and fraud prevention.
proshopDeleteAccount.retainedDataItem2: Transaction records required by tax, accounting, or legal compliance.
proshopDeleteAccount.retentionPeriod: Additional retention period: up to 90 days for operational records, and longer if required by applicable fiscal or legal obligations.
proshopDeleteAccount.partialDeletionTitle: 4. Partial data deletion (without deleting the account)
proshopDeleteAccount.partialDeletionBody: Yes, users may request deletion or correction of specific profile or preference data by contacting the same email and indicating what should be removed.

proshopLanding.metaDescription: Official Proshop landing page with product details and links to privacy policy and account deletion.
proshopLanding.title: Proshop
proshopLanding.subtitle: Technology ecommerce platform
proshopLanding.description: Discover technology products, manage purchases, and track orders with a clear, fast, and modern ecommerce experience.
proshopLanding.section1Body: Explore curated product categories, compare options, and find the right tech products quickly.
proshopLanding.section2Body: Complete secure purchases, manage shipping details, and track order status from one place.
proshopLanding.section3Body: Get direct access to your privacy policy and account/data deletion process.

miralabPrivacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy of MIRALAB, a software and mobile app development studio.
miralabPrivacy.title: Privacy policy - MIRALAB
miralabPrivacy.intro: MIRALAB is a software development studio responsible for the apps Matchpoint, Rize, and Proshop. This policy describes how we handle data from users who interact with our products and this website.
miralabPrivacy.controllerBody: Data controller: MIRALAB (Octavio Frangipani). Website: https://miralab.ar. Email: hola@miralab.ar.
miralabPrivacy.appsBody: MIRALAB develops and maintains the following apps: Matchpoint (beach volleyball tournaments), Rize (calisthenics training), and Proshop (technology ecommerce). Each app has its own specific privacy policy accessible from its respective landing page.
miralabPrivacy.dataCollectedBody: This website (miralab.ar) does not actively collect personal data beyond what is voluntarily provided through the contact form (name, email, and message). For data collected in individual apps, please refer to each product's own privacy policy.
miralabPrivacy.dataUseBody: Contact form data is used solely to respond to inquiries. It is not used for marketing purposes, and is not sold or shared with third parties.
miralabPrivacy.sharingBody: We do not sell or share personal data. We may use infrastructure providers (hosting, email) under confidentiality obligations.
miralabPrivacy.retentionBody: Contact form data is retained only as long as needed to handle the inquiry. You can request deletion at any time.
miralabPrivacy.rightsBody: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your data by writing to hola@miralab.ar.
miralabPrivacy.securityBody: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect information processed on this site.
miralabPrivacy.changesBody: We may update this policy. The current version will always be available at:
